subject: Voltorb — round red-and-white sphere Pokemon with angry narrowed eyes
description: A round sphere creature split cleanly between a red upper half and a white lower half, divided by a dark equatorial band. Two squinting, angry-looking eyes dominate the white lower section. The figure floats slightly above a flat surface, and the background features a bold yellow lightning-bolt graphic on a warm grey-tan ground. The composition is minimal and graphic — the creature's simple geometry fills the foreground with no secondary figures or environmental clutter.
foreground: round red-and-white sphere creature with dark band and narrow angry eyes, floating
background: bold yellow lightning bolt graphic on warm grey-tan ground
emotion: angry, aggressive — eyes narrowed in hostility
